spec: AG2 Beta governance middleware — pre-release join check
description: A real, independently schnorr-signed external attestation binds the SAME artifact_hash as the proposed action's intent_ref. Signature valid AND binding correct, so the join holds and release may proceed (subject to the gate decision). The positive of the triple.
test: external_attestation.artifact_hash == proposed_action.intent_ref AND sig valid  =>  release_record.outcome == 'released'
